examples: We are not born to handle quantitative distinctions skillfully.
For something curious has been happening in American universities, and Louis Menand, a professor of English at Harvard University, captured it skillfully.
His father watched him with admiration as the boy skillfully worked the fish alongside the bank and he very successfully lifted the exhausted fish from the water.
Most are run by reputable marketers but some are skillfully created by con artists.
Taxes must be restructured to increase revenue, but skillfully so as to not inhibit growth.
